data.title: 国际服活动「New Year's Rhapsody No. 68」
data.summary: [New Event Preview] New Year's Rhapsody No. 68 begins on 8/9! We're celebrating a New Year in Kivoto
data.body:
[New Event Preview]

New Year's Rhapsody No. 68 begins on 8/9!
We're celebrating a New Year in Kivotos with Problem Solver 68... It feels like there may be trouble around the corner, Sensei... 

#BlueArchive![hdI6ogfXMr7Ud9xbW7GzNdVoIkLVtQtM.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/hdI6ogfXMr7Ud9xbW7GzNdVoIkLVtQtM.jpg)
